data.title: Bitcoin's breakout at $98K indicates supply overhang. On-chain data suggests resistance above $100K.
data.description: An analysis from Glassnode highlights that Bitcoin's price being rejected at the $98,000 short-term high cost basis closely resembles the market structure from Q1 2022. Data from blockchain transactions indicates a significant amount of Bitcoin supply is concentrated above the $100,000 mark, limiting potential upward movement for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Indonesian company ParagonCorp celebrates 40 years, showcasing 24 AI-powered consumer experiences for global expansion.
data.description: Indonesia's premier beauty company recently organized the Beauty Science Technology 2026 event in Jakarta, showcasing their readiness for global expansion. With 40 years in the industry, PT Paragon Technology and Innovation demonstrated their growth potential with 24 innovative AI-powered consumer experiences. The event took place on January 21, 2026, highlighting the company's commitment to embracing advanced technology to enhance consumer engagement.

data.title: CLA earns Microsoft Solution Partner Designation for Data & AI and Digital & App Innovation on Azure, announced on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis on January 21, 2026, CLA (CliftonLarsonAllen LLP) revealed that it has achieved recognition as a Microsoft Solutions Partner in two key categories - Data & AI (Azure) and Digital & App Innovation (Azure). This acknowledgment highlights CLA's dedication to providing innovative solutions using Microsoft technologies.

data.title: Jin Medical International Ltd. (NASDAQ: ZJYL) to have fireside chat on Feb 1, 2026 about strategic priorities.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Jin Medical International Ltd. (NASDAQ: ZJYL), a prominent supplier of rehabilitation medical equipment in China, disclosed plans for a fireside chat on February 1, 2026. The chat will be conducted by key members of the management team and will focus on the Company's strategic objectives and financial structure. The event aims to offer insights into Jin Medical's future direction and capital-related decisions. NASDAQ-listed Jin Medical is recognized for its quality services in the field of rehabilitation medicine.
